strengths: Successfully introduced the loop through the slit opening
Demonstrated proper pusher advancement technique during knot tying
Maintained consistent camera positioning throughout most of the procedure
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit
Struggled with final loop positioning and securing
Did not achieve visible tail cutting completion

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening, focusing on proper positioning at the marked location.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within the time limit

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause to verify alignment, then practice controlled cinching without rushing the final steps.
drills.targets_weakness: Struggled with final loop positioning and securing

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: Practice 10 secure loop placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop position.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not achieve visible tail cutting completion

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid technique into complete task execution within time limits. Work on the final securing and cutting phases to achieve consistent task completion.
